name: AutoClipper YouTube Shorts - Render Upload Production

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  task_id: $json.task_id,
  workflow_mode: $json.workflow_mode,
  youtube_url: $json.youtube_url,
  num_clips: $json.num_clips,
  topic_hint: $json.topic_hint,
  watermark_url: $json.watermark_url,
  callback_url: $json.callback_url,
  fact_check_notes: $json.fact_check_notes,
  source_podcast_query: $json.source_podcast_query,
  source_candidate_queries: $json.source_candidate_queries,
  ai_enhance: $json.ai_enhance,
  ai_model: $json.ai_model,
  auto_clip_find: $json.auto_clip_find,
  face_tracking: $json.face_tracking,
  face_tracking_required: $json.face_tracking_required,
  face_tracking_smoothness: $json.face_tracking_smoothness,
  clips_plan: $json.clips_plan
} }}
